hero.title: Unlock your {{word}}
hero.description: The intelligent scheduling platform that adapts to your learning style. Plan smarter, study better, and achieve more with AI-powered insights.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.description: Powerful features designed to help you plan better, study smarter, and achieve your academic goals.

cards.paragraph: Smart algorithms analyze your learning patterns and suggest optimal study schedules.
Pomodoro-style timer with automatic breaks and productivity tracking.
Beautiful calendar views with drag-and-drop scheduling and color-coded tasks.
Collaborate with friends, share progress, and stay motivated together.
Detailed insights and charts to track your productivity and improvement.
Access your most-used features instantly with smart shortcuts and widgets.

mainCard.title: Your Personal Study Coach
mainCard.description: Our advanced AI learns from your habits, energy levels, and performance to create personalized study plans that actually work for you

aiSuggestion.label: AI Suggestion
aiSuggestion.message: You're most productive in the morning. I've scheduled your hardest subjects between 9-11 AM.

transform_section.heading: Ready To Transform Your Study Routine?
transform_section.description: Join students who are studying smarter, not harder. Start your free today — no credit card required.
